name: AI Editor
description: Policy for MCP-authenticated LLM clients (Claude Code, ChatGPT, Cursor). admin_access elevated 2026-04-30 (slice 18j) — full admin granted at the policy level so MCP clients can read/write across system collections (flows, dashboards, settings, etc.) for editorial workflows. The MCP system_prompt (set on directus_settings.mcp_system_prompt) is now the primary behavioral guard against destructive ops; it instructs LLMs to NEVER edit directus_* and NEVER delete rows. Treat this policy as 'admin with LLM-behavioral-guardrails', not 'sandboxed editor'.

name: Human Editor
description: Policy for human content editors. HISTORY: originally scoped (18e Phase 3); elevated to admin 2026-04-30 (slice 18j); re-scoped go2-t1d — the 190 itemized permissions below it were dormant under admin_access and are now live, plus directus_files/directus_folders rows added (app-access minimums exclude files).

name: Ops Bot content ops
description: Content CRUD + files + settings for ops scripts; cloned from Human Editor rows.

name: Build Bot — content read
description: Read-only policy for the Vercel build (export-fallbacks). slice-26 security debt.
